# ComplyEaze Tools

ComplyEaze Tools is an open-source, browser-local static site at
https://tools.complyeaze.com for Indian compliance review workflows.

The tools create draft working artifacts from pasted rows or plain text. They do
not create accounts, upload files, call an application API, provide legal or tax
advice, submit portal actions, or decide final compliance positions.

Primary audiences include CAs, CSs, CMAs, GST teams, accountants, finance
controllers, founders, executives, and business owners.

## Canonical Tools

| Tool | URL | Purpose | Inputs | Outputs | Source review | Limits |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| MSME Payables Age Triage | https://tools.complyeaze.com/msme-45-day-payment-due-date-calculator/ | Prepare MSME payables candidate-marker review drafts. | Pasted CSV/TSV payables rows with optional agreement, objection, payment, open-balance, dispute, Udyam evidence, and Udyam registration date columns. | Candidate review marker draft, missing-facts checklist, Udyam request text, management review note. | MSME Samadhaan and DC-MSME reviewed 2026-07-02. | Does not verify Udyam registration, decide statutory interest, decide tax disallowance, resolve disputes, or prepare filing packages. |
| GSTR-2B Purchase Reconciliation Triage | https://tools.complyeaze.com/gstr-2b-purchase-reconciliation-triage/ | Compare pasted purchase-register and GSTR-2B rows into exception buckets. | Pasted purchase-register rows, GSTR-2B rows, tax amount comparison table, and optional invoice date, document type, amendment table, ITC availability, and IMS status columns. | Exception bucket summary, ITC/IMS context flags, supplier follow-up basis, review checklist. | GSTR-2B manual reviewed 2026-07-02. | Does not determine ITC eligibility or replace recurring reconciliation. |
| GSTR-2B Missing Invoice Follow-up Generator | https://tools.complyeaze.com/gstr-2b-missing-invoice-vendor-follow-up/ | Create supplier-wise follow-up drafts for missing or mismatched invoices. | Pasted supplier issue rows with optional GSTIN, invoice date, period, document type, taxable value, tax amount, and escalation columns. | Supplier-wise issue packet, email draft, WhatsApp-ready summary. | GSTR-2B manual reviewed 2026-07-02. | Does not decide ITC eligibility or produce filing numbers for submission. |
| AIS and Form 26AS Mismatch Checker | https://tools.complyeaze.com/ais-form-26as-mismatch-checker/ | Prepare mismatch categories and deductor-wise verification drafts before tax-record review. | Pasted AIS summary rows or manual Form 26AS comparison table with optional deductor, TAN, section, income category, TDS/TCS, amount in books, mismatch category, and review action columns. | Mismatch category table, review checklist, deductor-wise verification draft. | Income Tax AIS/TDS sources reviewed 2026-07-02. | Does not compute ITR tax payable, refunds, or upload AIS feedback. |
| GST Portal Issue Evidence Memo Builder | https://tools.complyeaze.com/gst-portal-issue-evidence-memo/ | Create a user-observed GST filing-attempt timeline memo. | Manual timestamps, error labels, and retry notes. | Attempt timeline, client note, retry checklist. | GST self-service complaint portal reviewed 2026-07-02. | Does not prove global portal downtime or guarantee extension, waiver, or condonation. |
| Review Copy Builder | https://tools.complyeaze.com/privacy/review-copy-builder/ | Flatten and mask common identifiers in review text before professional handoff. | Plain text. | Masked text draft, mask report, manual review checklist, and review footer. | DPDP Act source reviewed 2026-07-02. | Does not perform OCR or provide forensic or legally irreversible redaction. |

## Trust Posture

- Files are processed in your browser.
- No account or file upload required.
- No analytics or telemetry in V0.
- Static site deployment with source, license, release-gate, image-scan,
  digest-pinning, privacy, security, and source-register pages.
- Cloudflare security checks may run on public HTML requests; this is disclosed
  on the privacy page and is separate from product analytics.
- Downloaded drafts include local artifact metadata, source references, row
  diagnostics, and Terms/Disclaimer links.

Repository: https://github.com/lamemustafa/complyeaze-tools
Source register: https://tools.complyeaze.com/source/
Security: https://tools.complyeaze.com/security/
Privacy: https://tools.complyeaze.com/privacy/
Terms and disclaimer: https://tools.complyeaze.com/terms/
Axal upgrade path: https://complyeaze.com/axal
